name: formal_boundary_core_boundary_model_v0_1
purpose: Formal model class for the current boundary-core-boundary cube/G60 cycle.

poke_set_t.description: Active boundary perturbation set at time t.

snapped_vertex_t.description: Discrete G60 attractor vertex selected by nearest-vertex snap.

return_path_class_t.description: Class of shortest admissible path from snapped vertex back to center.

center_state_t.description: Internal state of the cube center / core at time t.

next_face_state_t.description: Boundary face-state pattern emitted from center at time t.

Snap.description: Discretize induced interior bias by nearest G60 vertex.

Return.description: Assign known fastest admissible return path class to center.

CenterUpdate.description: Update the core using inward drain scale beta.

Emit.description: Radiate updated state to the boundary using outward scale alpha.

claims: alpha is expansive relative to beta
alpha is a candidate ignition / re-radiation scale
beta is a candidate inward drain / collapse scale
formal_conjecture: There exists a discrete boundary-core-boundary dynamical system on the anchored cube / G60 scaffold in which ignition and re-radiation are governed by alpha = phi^3, while centerward collapse is governed by beta = x^2, where x is the real root of 64x^3 + 63x^2 + 7x - 9 = 0.
